title: Camera Settings
failed_to_load_info: Failed to load camera info: {{ err }}
settings_applied: Camera settings applied — capture restarting with new configuration.
failed_to_apply: Failed to apply camera settings: {{ err }}
no_devices_hint: No V4L2 devices found. Running in Docker? Pass
resolution_help: Frames are letterboxed to 640×640 before YOLO inference; higher capture resolution mainly affects the displayed stream.
stereo_overlay_help: Blends the camera's left and right images into a single overlaid view for the stream and detection. When enabled, use the 3D button on the live video to adjust blend and alignment.
